field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: In LCCC, the mobile phase was delivered by an ISCO 2350 HPLC pump (ISCO, Lincoln, NE, USA) at a flow rate of 0.5 ml/min. Samples were injected using an autosampler Spark SPH 125 Fix (Spark Holland, Emmen, The Netherlands) equipped with a 20 ll loop. A refractive index detector RI 2414 (Waters) or a SEDEX 45 ELSD (Sedere, France) was connected to the DDS 70. Nitrogen was used as carrier gas, and the pressure at the nebulizer was set to 1.0 bar. Evaporator temperature: 30 �C. All separations in LCCC were performed on a Jordi Gel DVB 500 RP column (100% poly-divinylbenzene; 250 · 4.6 mm; particle diameter = 5 lm; pore size = 500 , from Jordi, Bellingham, MA, USA).
field_evidence.critical_component: In LCCC, the elution volume of each series is independent of molar mass.
field_evidence.column_name: Jordi Gel DVB 500 RP column (100% poly-divinylbenzene; 250 · 4.6 mm; particle diameter = 5 lm; pore size = 500 , from Jordi, Bellingham, MA, USA).

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume is independent of the chain length of the block A
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria; Christian Doppler Laboratory for Microwave Chemistry (CDLMC), Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria
